user.title: Hunter Douglas PowerView (BLE)
user.description: What do you want to set up?

menu_options.extract_key: Extract home key from a PowerView gateway

extract_key.title: Extract home key from gateway
extract_key.description: Enter the address of your PowerView Gen3 gateway. The integration will fetch the AES home key once and store it permanently — the gateway is only needed for this one call, after which it can be offline or out of range.

extract_key_confirm.title: PowerView gateway discovered
extract_key_confirm.description: Fetch the home key from the gateway at {host}?

pick_shade.title: Pair a PowerView shade
pick_shade.description: Pick a shade that's currently advertising via Bluetooth.

abort.home_key_saved: Home key extracted and saved. Existing shade entries are reloading to use it.
abort.home_key_already_saved: A home key is already saved for this installation. Use the integration menu to re-extract if it has changed.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the gateway or extract a home key. Check the address and that the gateway has paired shades.
